sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104314" key="tocopoii/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τοξο-ποιία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n104314.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the making of bows,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:156" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.156</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
